error.invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password, or account has been disabled
error.reset_invalid: Reset link invalid or expired, please request forgot password again
error.sso_invalid_callback: SSO callback parameters invalid (state validation failed or missing code)
error.sso_no_username: IdP userinfo missing a usable username field
error.no_profile: Current identity does not support profile management
error.no_change_pw: Current identity does not support password change (API Key has no account/password)
error.proposal_missing_params: Proposal job missing required parameters: topic/outline
error.kb_already_bound: KBase already bound to {current}, no rebind needed
error.not_wiki_link: Not a Feishu wiki link (path must contain /wiki/)
error.no_importable_docs: No importable documents in this range (only new docx format supported)
error.original_file_gone: Original file no longer exists (historical data not retained or cleaned up)
error.share_link_invalid: Share link does not exist or has expired
error.default_provider_undeletable: Default provider cannot be deleted, please switch default first
error.embedder_option_not_found: Embedder option not found or no key concept: {id}
error.embedder_no_page_key: This option has no page key configured: {id}

login.forgot_hint: Enter your username or email, we will send a reset link
login.reset_hint: Reset link valid within 30 minutes, can only be used once
login.reset_done: Password has been reset, please log in with the new password
login.pwd_min: New password must be at least 6 characters
login.pwd_mismatch: The two entered passwords do not match

msg.citation_missing: Citation [{n}] does not exist (may be from a previous message or wrong model number)
msg.zoom_image: Zoom to view image on page {page} of {doc}
msg.copy_failed: Copy failed, please select text manually

share.invalid_hint: Ask the colleague who provided this link for a new address
share.based_on: Answer based on '{kb}' materials, with citations
share.disclaimer: Answer based on knowledge base with citations. Refer to original.

pwd.changed: Password changed. Use new password next login.
pwd.verify_hint: Enter current password to verify identity.

email.title: Bind email
email.desc: Your account is not bound to an email. Email is used for password reset. Recommend to bind now.
email.label: Email address

upload.label: Upload documents, click or drag files here

digest.no_ready_docs: No ready documents in this knowledge base

smtp.title: Outbox settings
smtp.desc: System notification email sending account: after configuration, new users (with email filled in) will automatically receive account activation notification. For personal email like 163/QQ, the 'password' should be the SMTP authorization code, not the login password
smtp.from_addr: Default sender address (leave blank = same as SMTP user)
smtp.password_required: SMTP password/authorization code required on first setup
smtp.saved: Outbox saved; it is recommended to send a test email to confirm connectivity
smtp.test_sent: Test email sent to {to}, please check (including spam)

ops.title: Operations Dashboard (Last 7 Days)
ops.unanswered_title: Recent Unanswered Questions (Knowledge Gap; consider adding documentation)
ops.downvote_title: Recent Downvoted Answers (consider reviewing documentation or retrieval config)

embedder.saved: Key saved; will take effect on next embedding/retrieval
embedder.cleared: Page key cleared; falling back to environment variable
embedder.title: Embedding Model Key
embedder.desc: API Key for cloud embedding model (openai-embed); page config takes precedence over env var; saved key will be used on next embedding
embedder.no_options: No cloud embedding model options in configuration file embedders list

user.title: User Management
user.adv_hint: When enabled, users can see model selection and multi-database search
user.create_desc: Set username, role, and initial password
user.email_optional: Email (optional, for account info and password recovery)
user.initial_pw_ph: Initial password (user can change after login)

apikey.copy_failed: Copy failed, please manually select and copy
apikey.create_desc: Set name and role; full key shown only once after creation
apikey.save_now_desc: Full key will not be viewable after closing this dialog
apikey.revoke_confirm: Confirm revoke {name}? Requests using this key will be immediately rejected. This action cannot be undone.

license.title: License Status
license.banner_expiring: License expires on {date} ({days} days remaining). Please contact supplier for renewal.
license.banner_trial: Trial mode active, all features available. Please import a valid license soon.
license.banner_expired: License expired ({date}). Contact admin to update.
license.banner_invalid: Invalid license. Check if license.json is tampered or corrupted.

provider.cannot_delete: Default provider cannot be deleted, please switch default first
provider.params_not_object: params must be a JSON object (key-value pairs)
provider.key_ph_configured: Configured {hint}, leave empty to keep unchanged
provider.key_ph_new: sk-... (leave empty to use environment variable)
provider.need_key: Please fill in API Key or key environment variable name (choose one)
provider.form_desc: API Key can be filled directly (saved on server), or fill in environment variable name to read from server environment.
provider.preset_ph: Select a major provider to auto-fill, or manually customize
provider.name_ph: Unique identifier for provider, e.g., openai
provider.api_key: API Key (fill directly, saved on server)
provider.clear_key: Clear saved Key (use environment variable below instead)
provider.model_ph: Click button above to fetch list, or directly enter model name

feishu.creds_saved: Feishu credentials saved, you can use 'Import from Feishu' on library detail page
feishu.title: Feishu Knowledge Base
feishu.desc: Once configured, you can import documents from Feishu wiki on the library details page, with hierarchical structure automatically preserved for citation tracing.

setup.step1: Go to {platform} to create an enterprise self-built app, obtain App ID / App Secret
setup.perm_all_readonly: Enable all read-only permissions at once
setup.perm_board: {code} (Export board as image, commonly used for architecture diagrams)
setup.perm_note: App identity permissions require admin review, {review}; after enabling, {publish} — just checking without publishing won't take effect
setup.perm_review: It is recommended to enable all at once to avoid repeated approvals
setup.step3: Target knowledge base → Settings → Members → {addMember} — only having permissions without being added to the KB will not allow reading content
setup.add_member: Add this app as a member

connector.created: Connector created, first sync in progress
connector.creds_hint: {msg}—Please configure first in the 'Import from Feishu' dialog or Settings → Connectors
connector.deleted_purge: Connector and its synced documents deleted
connector.desc: Bind an external data source and sync incrementally on a schedule—additions/edits/deletions from the source are automatically reflected in the library, keeping it consistent with the source (mirror deletion can be disabled).
connector.empty: No connectors yet. Create a Feishu connector to keep your knowledge base automatically updated with the wiki.
connector.source_ph: https://xxx.feishu.cn/wiki/… (sync that subtree) or space_id (entire space)
connector.prune_label: Mirror Deletion: Documents deleted from the source are also deleted locally (keep consistent with source)
connector.delete_confirm: After deleting '{name}', scheduled sync will stop.
connector.purge_label: Also delete {count} synced documents (if unchecked, keep as regular documents)

feishubot.need_kb: Please select the knowledge base the bot uses to answer
feishubot.need_token: First-time configuration requires Verification Token (Feishu admin event subscription page)
feishubot.title: Feishu Group Bot
feishubot.encrypt_label_keep: Encrypt Key (optional, leave blank = keep current)
feishubot.encrypt_ph: Only needed if event encryption is enabled
feishubot.desc_intro: In Feishu group chat, {'@'}bot (or private chat) to ask questions. It will automatically search the selected knowledge base and reply with a card (including source citations). Use the same self-built app above: need to enable the 'Bot' capability, grant {scopeMsg} and {scopeSend} permissions, add {eventKey} to event subscriptions, and fill in the callback URL below in 'Request URL'.
feishubot.desc_authed: After {oneClickBot}, publish the version to take effect (event subscription and callback URL still need to be configured manually as below).
feishubot.desc_no_creds: (The one-click permission link will appear only after configuring the app credentials in the 'Feishu Connector' above)

feishuimport.need_creds: Please fill in Feishu app credentials first (App ID and App Secret)
feishuimport.all_failed: Found {count} documents, but all content retrieval failed. First reason: {reason}. If 400/403, usually the app lacks docx:document:readonly permission (remember to publish after enabling)
feishuimport.imported_failed: ; {failed} documents failed to retrieve and were skipped
feishuimport.title: Import from Feishu Knowledge Base
feishuimport.desc: Paste a wiki page link (import that page and all subpages) or a knowledge space space_id (import entire space); document hierarchy is preserved in citation traceability
feishuimport.setup_title: First-time use requires three configuration steps (all are mandatory):
feishuimport.source_label: Feishu wiki link or space ID
feishuimport.importing: Importing (may take a while if many documents)...
feishuimport.setup_step1: Go to {platform} to create an enterprise self-built app, obtain App ID and App Secret, fill them in below
feishuimport.setup_step2: In the app's 'Permission Management', {allReadonly} (app identity permissions require admin approval, enable all at once to avoid repeated approvals): seven read-only permissions: wiki / docx / drive / docs / sheets / bitable / board, and {publish} (just checking without publishing won't take effect; full list see Settings → Connector)
feishuimport.setup_step3: Open the target knowledge base → Settings → Members → {addMember} (having permissions alone without being added to the KB will not allow reading content)
feishuimport.configured_note: Using the configured Feishu app: {appId} (can be changed in Settings → Connector; if a permission error occurs, {oneClickPerm} and then publish a version)
feishuimport.troubleshoot: Common causes to check: ① The app must enable all read-only permissions and {publish} to take effect (permission list and one-click enable see above or Settings → Connector); ② The app must be {addKbMember} (knowledge base settings → Members → Add app); having only permissions without being added to the KB will still not allow reading; ③ The link must be a wiki page URL (containing /wiki/), cloud document /docx/ links are not supported for direct import
feishuimport.add_kb_member: Add as a member of this knowledge base

sharedlg.revoked: Revoked, the link is now invalid
sharedlg.title: Share without login
sharedlg.desc: Holders of the link can ask questions about this knowledge base without an account (with citation traceability). You can also embed the Q&A on any website using the embed code. The answer model is bound here and cannot be changed by visitors.
sharedlg.note_ph: e.g., official website customer service window

chunk.saved_parent: Saved (parent block not in retrieval index)
chunk.title: Chunk Management: {name}
chunk.desc: Total {total} chunks. Disabled chunks are no longer retrieved; editing a leaf block will re-vectorize it using the library's vector model.
chunk.edit_desc_leaf: Saving will re-vectorize using the library's vector model and update keyword index
chunk.edit_desc_parent: Parent block serves only as answer context; takes effect upon next reference after saving

review.approved: Confirmed and added to library, starting vectorization
review.title: Review Recognition Results: {name}
review.desc: Compare the original image on the left with the recognized text on the right (editable). Vectorization occurs only after confirmation.

grants.title: Access Permissions: {name}
grants.desc: If no one is selected = public (visible to all logged-in users); if selected, only selected users, the library creator, and admins can access
grants.no_users: No other users yet. Create them in User Management first.

proposal.topic_placeholder: e.g., Implementation Plan for Talent Introduction Housing Guarantee in a Certain City
proposal.req_placeholder: Add writing requirements, e.g., policy basis, length, focus

outline.empty: No sections yet, click button below to add

settings.subtitle: Model Providers, Users & Keys, License & System Status
settings.no_providers: No providers yet, please add one
settings.delete_provider_confirm: Confirm delete '{name}'? This action cannot be undone.

sec.connectors_desc: External data sources like Feishu Knowledge Base

kb.title: Knowledge Base
kb.subtitle: Manage enterprise knowledge base, document import and access permissions
kb.create_desc: Enter knowledge base name and select vector model
kb.embedder_label: Vector model (cannot be changed after creation)
kb.demo_hint: Create two demo bases (policy base with tables and illustrations in docx, case base for multi-base query), ready for Q&A
kb.parse_ocr: Table Enhanced (PDF forced structured parsing, merged broken tables)
kb.parse_vlm: Full Model Deep Recognition (complex images, requires manual verification)
kb.url_placeholder: Or paste a web URL to import (http/https, intranet wiki also supported)
kb.delete_doc_confirm: Confirm delete '{name}'? This action cannot be undone.
kb.delete_kb_confirm: Will delete '{name}' and its {count} documents and related sessions, irreversible.
kb.demo_loaded: Demo data loaded (policy base + case base with table and illustration samples), parsing
kb.demo_exists: Demo knowledge base already exists, opening directly

analysis.no_docs_prefix: No documents in this knowledge base. Please go to
analysis.empty_hint: Select a knowledge base and enter a query to view the search process

translations.title: Multilingual
translations.subtitle: Edit translations for each language. Save to write to overlay. Takes effect immediately in current session.
translations.hint: Leave empty and save = delete the override, fall back to baseline translation. Chinese is the source language; usually only modify English/Malay.

forbidden.title: No permission to access admin panel
forbidden.desc: Your account does not have permission to manage knowledge bases. Contact an administrator for management permissions, or return to the user interface to continue Q&A.

generate.select_kb_first: Please select a knowledge base first

doc.empty: No documents. Drag and drop or select files to upload.

empty.title: How can I help you?
empty.hint_questions: Try one of the questions below, or just type your own
empty.hint_empty: Ask a question to start a new conversation
empty.q_main: What are the main points of "{title}"?
empty.q_numbers: What specific standards or figures are in {title}?

session.delete_confirm: This will delete "{title}" and all its messages. This cannot be undone.

chat.feedback_recorded: Recorded. We will improve the answer to this question.
chat.input_placeholder: Enter your question for the knowledge base...
chat.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line · Answers are based on knowledge base materials with citations. Refer to original text.

topbar.joint_hint: New session will search across selected knowledge bases (cross-KB combined Q&A)
